title: Ultimate mod
description: Explore a new world filled with the colors of ultra-technological tools!
body:
**_Welcome to the ultimate mod!_**
The mod provides you with the opportunity to improve your gaming experience both in the early and late game. At the early stage of the game, you can craft a potato cannon that shoots potatoes and a pitchfork that throws haystacks, and at the end of the game you can get an exoskeleton that makes you practically invulnerable, a rifle that shoots deafening bursts, a xeno saber that can neutralize your enemies, and a determinator that can an expensive fee to destroy everything in sight! All late-game items are created in the constructor, an advanced version of the stove, workbench and chest, powered by batteries obtained by burning biomass or gasoline in a generator.

**!ATTENTION!**
_This mod was made by me about 3 years ago and versions 1.6.0 and 1.5.1 are quite poorly balanced! The mod is not prepared for late game survival and is more of a personal impulse towards creativity! Don't judge harshly <3_
